{{CargoRelic
|name=Data of Fire Salamanders
|class_id=20395
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=The data of the fire salamander comprehensively documents the genetic coding from low-ranking to high-ranking fire salamanders. Their appearance is vibrant red, resembling a burning flame, emitting enchanting radiance. However, accompanying this is the risk of extreme explosiveness, requiring cautious storage.
|fame=16
|art=14
|fth=13
|civ=16
|tech=31
|ss1=Minion MAX +10<br>Per Species Map entry completed, Snail ATK +1<br>Species Map Entries: 60/60
|ss2=Minion MAX +15<br>Per Species Map entry completed, Snail ATK +2<br>Species Map Entries: 60/60
|ss3=Minion MAX +20<br>Per Species Map entry completed, Snail ATK +3<br>Species Map Entries: 60/60
|ss4=Minion MAX +20<br>Per Species Map entry completed, Snail ATK +3<br>Species Map Entries: 60/60
|ss7=Minion MAX +20<br>Per Species Map entry completed, Snail ATK +3<br>Species Map Entries: 60/60<br> (Awakened)
}}
